title: Table-valued functions with required parameters
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE testvtab(x INT, p1 INT);
INSERT INTO testvtab(x, p1) VALUES (1, NULL);
SELECT * FROM testvtab WHERE x = 1 OR p1 IS NULL;
SELECT * FROM testvtab WHERE x = 2 AND p1 = 10;
key_bug_features: Table-valued functions require parameters but fail validation
